ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species subjected to the experiment */,
  "dilution_rate" REAL /* Dilution rate used in the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., field, lab) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "sample_number" INTEGER /* Sample number from the experiment */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the sample */,
  "lag1_ac" REAL /* Lag-1 autocorrelation coefficient */,
  "lag2_ac" REAL /* Lag-2 autocorrelation coefficient */,
  "lag10_ac" REAL /* Lag-10 autocorrelation coefficient */,
  "aic_fold" REAL /* AIC fold value */,
  "aic_hopf" REAL /* AIC hopf value */,
  "aic_null" REAL /* AIC null value */,
  "smax" REAL /* Smax value */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the result file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the researcher belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, graduate student) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Research institution or affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, least concern) */,
  "taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "autocorrelation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each autocorrelation metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "lag" INTEGER /* Lag number for autocorrelation */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the autocorrelation coefficient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the autocorrelation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_autocorrelation_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aic_values" (
  "aic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AIC value entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "fold" REAL /* AIC fold value */,
  "hopf" REAL /* AIC hopf value */,
  "null" REAL /* AIC null value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AIC value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aic_values_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_sizes" (
  "sample_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample size entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "sample_number" INTEGER /* Sample number from the experiment */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples taken in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_sizes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the collaboration */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., research, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, research center) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
